message:
fix(activity): relax dashboard thresholds (green <5m, yellow 5-10m)

2-minute green threshold was too aggressive for agent work that involves
compiling, testing, and multi-step operations. Agents were showing
yellow/red while actively working.

Co-Authored-By: JeremyKalmus <noreply@users.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
